title: Not Targeting Rohit With Narine in Powerplay Was Bad Captaincy From Rahane: Harbhajan
description: Chasing 221, Rohit smashed 78 off 38 balls while adding 148 in 72 balls with opening partner Ryan Rickelton (81 off 43 balls), as the KKR bowlers were taken to the cleaners on a flat Wankhede surface
